data.body: 76d2 IaC DONE + validated: opcert.tf (API GW HTTP API v2 AWS_IAM + rebar-opcert-admin role + 2 SSM SecureStrings + random guard), compose/nginx structural deny-all guard, materialize-opcert-guard.sh wired into compose-up.sh, trusted_environments.yaml pin (log-position form, placeholder key), 14 hermetic tests. terraform fmt/validate clean. Findings: (a) AC1 jq assertions must run POST-APPLY (computed values unknown on fresh plan) — documented; (b) terraform show -json omits lifecycle_meta_arguments on current TF — added source-contract awk fallback. gitignore: trusted_environments.yaml trackable, .opcert-key ignored. AWS CLI authed (acct 896586841071, no refresh needed). DEPLOY PLAN: land 8f1d+76d2 code -> terraform apply -> gen+seed key -> update pin real key -> box compose-up (PRODUCTION gerrit box, fail-closed nginx guard) -> live checks -> operator-attested close. 8f1d implementer still running.
